ui.title: EE Alerts and Notifications Widget
ui.desc: Critical warning center for bank staff regarding pending approvals, onboarding requests, and overdue payments.

data.sql: SELECT 'Pending Financing Approval' as "Alert", C_MAIN_REF as "Details", 'High' as "Priority" FROM %EXIMTRX%.FADA_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'P' UNION ALL SELECT 'Supplier Onboarding Request', 'Supplier ABC Corp', 'Medium' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'Payment Overdue Notice', 'Anchor XYZ payment overdue', 'Critical' FROM DUAL
